ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the item was purchased */,
  "purchase_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the item at the time of purchase */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the item is stored */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company from which the item was purchased */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number for the purchase */,
  "requestable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item is requestable by other departments */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in stock */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., new, used, refurbished) */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the company */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, department head, procurement officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being requested */,
  "requesting_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the item */,
  "requested_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "approving_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_requests_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_requests_requesting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("requesting_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being moved */,
  "source_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source location */,
  "destination_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item moved */,
  "move_date" TEXT /* Date the item was moved */,
  "moved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who moved the item */,
  "move_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the move (e.g., requisition, return, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_movements_destination_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_movements_source_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_movements_moved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("moved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_movements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_requisitions" (
  "requisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requisition */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being requisitioned */,
  "requisitioning_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requisitioning the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item requisitioned */,
  "requisition_date" TEXT /* Date the requisition was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the requisition (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the requisition was approved */,
  "approving_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved the requisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_requisitions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_requisitions_requisitioning_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("requisitioning_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_parent_child" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent-child relationship */,
  "parent_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent item */,
  "child_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the child item per parent item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_parent_child_child_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_parent_child_parent_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item affected */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., purchase, movement, requisition, retirement) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_audit_trail_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_audit_trail_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
